truthAudit.Summary: Run 2 correctly identified 6 of the 20 true vulnerabilities (SC-V3-001, SC-V3-005, SC-V3-006, SC-V3-009, SC-V3-010, SC-V3-011) and introduced 2 extra findings not in the ground truth. It missed 14 true vulnerabilities, including critical logic bombs, use-after-free, and race conditions. Minor misclassifications in location, severity, and CWE were noted and corrected.

Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified the format string issue using printf(active_format.c_str(), user_input) and cited CWE-134.
Run 2 did not mention the integer overflow in the factorial computation.
Run 2 missed the use-after-free in stage_deferred_history_flush / memory pool cleanup.
Run 2 found an 'exec' command injection but missed the specific command injection via config validation (validator_cmd + config_file).

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: Stack Buffer Overflow in evaluate_expression Due to Flawed Length Check
Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified the buffer overflow in evaluate_expression when expression.length() >= sizeof(input_buffer_) uses strcpy.
Run 2 correctly identified the race condition where value_ is read before lock acquisition.
Run 2 did not identify the logic bomb / emergency override in authentication.
Run 2 missed the path traversal in config loading.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: Stack Buffer Overflow in ExpressionParser::parse via strcpy
Items.Notes: Run 2 identified the overflow in ExpressionParser::parse but misclassified it as a stack buffer overflow instead of a heap/pool overflow.
Run 2 correctly identified the hardcoded admin credentials, though it underestimated severity.
Run 2 correctly identified the weak PRNG and small token space, though cited CWE-330 instead of CWE-338.
Run 2 missed the thread-unsafe localtime cache.
Run 2 missed the insecure temp file handling in append_override_audit_event.
Run 2 missed persistent authentication state risks.
Run 2 missed unhandled exceptions in variable parsing.
Run 2 missed integer underflow in memory pool block split.
Run 2 missed unbounded recursion in parser.
Run 2 missed data race in result cache.
Run 2 missed TOCTOU in config loading.
Run 2 missed integer division by zero in route score calculation.

Items.Key: off-by-one in safe_string_copy|buffer over-read/over-write|cwe-131|medium|1|enhanced_calc.cpp|200|206|string_utils::safe_string_copy|size_t src_len = strlen(src); if (src_len > dest_size) src_len = dest_size; memcpy(dest, src, src_len); dest[src_len] = '\0';|when src_len == dest_size, memcpy writes dest_size bytes, then dest[src_len] = '\0' writes one byte past the allocated buffer, causing a heap/stack overflow.|call safe_string_copy with src length exactly equal to dest_size.|cap at dest_size - 1: if (src_len >= dest_size) src_len = dest_size - 1;->off-by-one in safe_string_copy|buffer over-read/over-write|cwe-131|medium|1|enhanced_calc.cpp|200|206|string_utils::safe_string_copy|size_t src_len = strlen(src); if (src_len > dest_size) src_len = dest_size; memcpy(dest, src, src_len); dest[src_len] = '\0';|when src_len == dest_size, memcpy writes dest_size bytes, then dest[src_len] = '\0' writes one byte past the allocated buffer, causing a heap/stack overflow.|call safe_string_copy with src length exactly equal to dest_size.|cap at dest_size - 1: if (src_len >= dest_size) src_len = dest_size - 1;
